description: This file defines styling mixins and responsive container classes for a CSS framework, including media queries and breakpoint-specific container widths.

methods.name: make-container
methods.description: Mixin that sets up container styling and widths.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-up
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles at and above specified breakpoints.

methods.name: breakpoint-infix
methods.description: Function to generate class name infixes based on breakpoint names.
